3 Montezuma 7 ··· Blue Point / Invincible Spirit 3.4 9-2 (-8) Paul Mulrennan Jim Goldie 95 78 326-21 57.2 12.3% 8.2 8.2 4.00 -12.8pp
📰 Lightly raced 4yo who built on his reappearance second over C&D (soft) to win a 17-runner handicap over C&D (good to soft) a fortnight ago; also effective on good/good to firm; up 7lb for last time but did it nicely and he could be just the type of Jim Goldie sprinter to keep on improving.
🧠 In contention. Rated around the field average (RPR 95, TS 78); strong recent form; going may not suit; good course record; market price confirms model confidence.
🧢 52W/301R 17% IV 1.47
4 Jer Batt ↑ 11 ··· Dragon Pulse / Art Connoisseur 3.0 9-8 (-2) Callum Rodriguez David & Nicola Barron 97 98 3337-7 55.4 10.5% 9.5 9.0 6.00 -5.5pp
📰 Without a win since August 2024 but well treated on last year's best efforts and he shaped when seventh of 14 over C&D three weeks ago as though he'd be sharper for that comeback run; seems to like it here; on the shortlist.
🧠 In contention. Well-rated for this grade (RPR 97, TS 98); on a declining curve; good course record, top jockey booked; significant steamer today (8/1 → 5/1, 38% shorter).
🧢 27W/139R 19% IV 1.62
5 Ziggy's Triton 3 ··· Profitable / Dubawi 1.8 9-10 Jason Hart David O'Meara 96 70 -25395 52.2 8.1% 12.4 16.9 17.00 +0.0pp
📰 Won over C&D (good) last August and scored twice in a row at Southwell (5f, AW) in December; didn't run badly when fifth of 12 back on turf over C&D (soft) three weeks ago and could build on that back on better ground.
🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 96, TS 70); modest recent form, on a declining curve; going conditions are ideal; good course record.
🧢 24W/147R 16% IV 1.40
6 Reigning Profit 10 ··· Profitable / Elusive City 4.3 9-1 (-9) James Sullivan Ruth Carr 96 93 78-578 51.3 7.5% 13.4 17.1 10.00 -4.1pp
📰 Trouble in running on both AW starts last month and same story at Pontefract last time, in the circumstances doing well to finish eighth of 13 from 4lb out of the handicap; he has a good record at Pontefract but could play a leading role off his proper mark today if getting the breaks.
🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 96, TS 93); modest recent form, on an improving trajectory; going conditions are ideal; good course record.
🧢 7W/95R 7% IV 0.65
7 Knicks (IRE) 1 ··· Invincible Spirit / Majestic Missile 3.0 8-4 (-20) Shay Farmer(7) Michael & David Easterby 96 93 3039-6 50.9 7.2% 13.9 17.1 19.00 +0.6pp
📰 It's a long time since he won but he was a close third over C&D (good to soft) last September and was an encouraging sixth of 18 on recent reappearance at Thirsk (6f, good); might not be far away if the removal of the tongue-tie isn't an issue; won in 2023 when he last wore these cheekpieces.
🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 96, TS 93); modest recent form, on a declining curve; well-handicapped at the weights; good course record; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
8 Albegone ↓↓ 8 ··· Alhebayeb / Paco Boy 8-5 (-19) Duran Fentiman Tim Easterby 96 90 8-2042 49.6 6.5% 15.5 17.1 29.00 +2.4pp
📰 His form can be up and down but he's gone close on two of his last four starts, most recently off this at Nottingham (5f, good) last month; has won twice over C&D and could be in the shake-up.
🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 96, TS 90); well-handicapped at the weights; good course record; drifting in the market (10/1 → 33/1, 230% longer); market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
🧢 2W/43R 5% IV 0.47
9 Archduke Ferdinand 9 ··· Gutaifan / Daaher 2.5 9-6 (-4) Dale Swift Seb Spencer 96 92 0075-9 48.7 6.0% 16.6 17.1 23.00 +1.5pp
📰 Course winner who has dropped to a mark 3lb lower than when winning at Redcar (6f, good to firm) last May; he could improve for this month's reappearance run over C&D but he failed to threaten, which was also the case on his final few outings last season; needs to get back on track.
🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 96, TS 92); modest recent form, on a declining curve; good course record; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
🧢 5W/29R 17% IV 1.41
10 South Parade (IRE) ⚡GS 12 ··· Invincible Army / Pastoral Pursuits 3.0 8-12 (-12) Warren Fentiman(3) Richard & Peter Fahey 95 90 3079-0 46.5 5.0% 20.0 17.7 23.00 +1.3pp
📰 She's dropped back down to a dangerous mark but she struggled on her final three starts last season and did likewise on her reappearance over C&D a fortnight ago; a major turnaround is necessary.
🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 95, TS 90); modest recent form, on a declining curve; going may not suit, well-handicapped at the weights, fast breaker from the stalls; good course record; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.

📰 Completed a hat-trick last summer (5f/6f) and had excuses on his final two starts last season, namely a slow start at tight Chester and soft ground at Doncaster; could rediscover his progressive ways on this comeback.
🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 94, TS 78); on a declining curve; going may not suit, well-handicapped at the weights; good course record; drifting in the market (14/1 → 33/1, 136% longer); market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.

🧠 Rated around the field average (RPR 96, TS 65); modest recent form, on a declining curve; well-handicapped at the weights; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.

        "fair_odds": "3.99",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Launched handicap career with two good AW runs this year; short of room at crucial stage before keeping on for fourth at Southwell (1m) this month and might have a bigger effort in him if this switch to turf suits."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Mereside Princess",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "David & Nicola Barron",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "4-3766",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "46.9",
        "model_pct": "15.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.57",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ten-race maiden; shaped quite well before fading into sixth at Southwell (7f, AW) last month but raced too freely and was safely held when upped to 1m at Redcar (good to firm; behind Harswell River) on Monday."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Liquid Cooled",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Ben Haslam",
        "ts": "41",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "670-14",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "46.4",
        "model_pct": "14.3%",
        "fair_odds": "6.98",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-17.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished well to make winning seasonal/handicap debut at Newcastle (6f, AW) in March, and this month's fourth of 14 at Pontefract (6f, good to soft) was perfectly respectable; has some stamina on his dam's side and looks interesting on this first attempt at 1m."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Harswell River",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "Roger Fell",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "666-53",
        "sire": "River Boyne",
        "dam_sire": "Manduro",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "45.7",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.55",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looks fully exposed after 16 starts but has performed well on both appearances this year, more recently when third of 12 at Redcar (1m, good to firm) on Monday; probably won't be far away."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Alice's Influence",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "David Evans",
        "ts": "41",
        "rpr": "55",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "059-4",
        "sire": "Massaat",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "45.4",
        "model_pct": "12.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.83",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unexposed after only four starts and put in fairly good front-running shift before weakening into fourth on last month's seasonal/handicap debut at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW); harmed her chance by persistently hanging right there and may improve if the new visor helps to keep her focused here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Hood Wink (GB)",
        "jockey": "Sean Kirrane",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "43",
        "rpr": "61",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "254-07",
        "sire": "Time Test",
        "dam_sire": "Marju",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "42.4",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.30",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Nine-race maiden; ran poorly on seasonal debut ten days ago but looked unlucky not to finish closer than seventh at Redcar on Monday (1m, good to firm; denied clear run); not ruled out each-way."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Truly Special (GB)",

        "trainer": "John Wainwright",
        "ts": "36",

        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",

        "fair_odds": "13.49",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed in Leicester nursery (1m, good) for David O'Meara in October but signed off for him with down-the-field AW run in November and needs to rebound on this stable debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "ts": "41",

        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Struggled in her first two handicaps, the latter on seasonal debut at Nottingham (8.3f, good) this month, and has now been unplaced all five starts; can't be recommended."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Wetherby",
    "time": "14:30",
    "race_name": "Bet With The On-Course Bookmakers Novice Stakes (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 1,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Princling (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "22-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "62.8",
        "model_pct": "24.0%",
        "fair_odds": "4.17",
        "best_dec": "1.44",
        "edge": "-47.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lost out only narrowly to a next-time-out winner on debut at Kempton (7f, AW) in October and probably bettered that form when second to another good prospect at Newmarket (7f, good) later that month; upped in trip for this seasonal debut; ought to be hard to beat."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Unchartedterritory (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "54-",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "12.0%",
        "fair_odds": "8.34",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well-bred gelding who bettered low-key 2yo debut when respectable fourth of seven at Ayr (1m, good to soft) in September; should have more improvement to come this year but a minor role may be his best hope here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Oathbound (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "59-",
        "sire": "Kameko",
        "dam_sire": "Mizzen Mast",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.4",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.49",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+6.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Quite promising debut when fifth of ten at Newbury (1m, soft) in October but disappointed at Southwell (AW) the following month; stablemate Princling appeals much more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Ervani",
        "jockey": "Shane Foley",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Dubai Destination",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.56",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-12.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tenth foal; closely related to a French 1m1f/1m2f winner, half-brother to five winners including Eziyra (7f-1m4f including Group 2; RPR 114), Etneya (1m; 101) and Eshera (1m including Listed; 96); dam 9.4f/1m4f winner (99), half-sister to two Gold Cup winners; makes appeal on paper."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Freddie Steady Go (GB)",
        "jockey": "Harry Russell",
        "trainer": "Susan Corbett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Frontiersman",
        "dam_sire": "Bahri",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "11.6%",
        "fair_odds": "8.64",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+10.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Created good impression when winning good-ground Newcastle bumper on debut last April but was very disappointing on hurdle debut there in January (had wind op soon afterwards); probably best watched on Flat debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Picture Palace (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Harry Davies",
        "trainer": "Simon & Ed Crisford",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "62",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "23",
        "sire": "Pinatubo",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "47.9",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.53",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made the frame on both 1m AW starts this year but no match for easy winner when second of four at Chelmsford on first occasion and beaten over 7l when fourth (promoted to third) at Kempton last time; gelded last month; improvement required."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "dam_sire": "Canford Cliffs",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",

        "fair_odds": "11.64",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First foal; dam useful bumper and 1m6f Flat (RPR 101) winner for the stable, half-sister to winners John Clare (7f) and Special Mayson (6f/7f); has good standard to reach on debut."
      },
      {

        "spotlight": "Displayed promise when fifth in two 1m AW novice races in February/March but will probably be of greater interest when qualified for handicaps."

      }
    ]

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed promise with second of seven at Wolverhampton (5f, AW) where she was a 15-2 shot; recorded a modest RPR but looks open to progress, especially upped a furlong in trip (dam 6f winner)."

        "rank": 3,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal; Too Darn Hot half-sister to 7f AW 2yo winner King's Trust (RPR 81); dam Listed-placed 1m2f scorer (106), out of 7f 2yo winner, is granddaughter of half-sister to Oaks runner-up Flight Of Fancy; yard's 2yo runners this season include a winning newcomer; shortlisted."

        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal; 110,000gns yearling; by Wootton Bassett; sibling to two winners, notably Private Signal (7f 2yo; 93); dam 7f AW scorer (94), closely related to 1m-1m2f Group 1 winner Legatissimo; yard's 2yo record this term features a winning newcomer at Nottingham; interesting."

        "spotlight": "March foal; Persian Force half-sister to 5.7f 2yo winner Buenos Dias (RPR 77); dam 1m scorer (88), half-sister to 6f 2yo Group 2 winner Lilbourne Lad; connections' 2yo runners this term include a filly who scored on debut; one to consider."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "January foal; \u00a390,000 yearling; from the first crop of Blackbeard and first foal of 7f winner (RPR 90) whose siblings include Group-placed 6f 2yo scorer Brussels; stable's 2yo record this season features a successful newcomer; possibilities."

  {
    "course": "Wetherby",
    "time": "15:00",
    "race_name": "Vertu Mazda York Fillies' Novice Stakes (GBB/GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 1,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Sea The Storm (FR)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "12-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Monsun",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "63.8",
        "model_pct": "27.9%",
        "fair_odds": "3.59",
        "best_dec": "1.57",
        "edge": "-39.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Trained as 2yo by David Menuisier (same owners); Sea The Stars filly who overcame evident inexperience to emerge well on top in a maiden at Sandown (1m, soft) in September on debut; 4-5 for Group 3 at Baden-Baden (1m, soft) five weeks later, which she didn't win but her running-on second of eight suggested she could be a very useful prospect and is far and away the best performance in this field."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Pierian",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Palace Pier",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "16.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.19",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ninth foal; Palace Pier close relation to 1m2f winner Noble Horizon (RPR 95), half-sister to six winners including Thunder Drum (1m3f/1m4f including Group 3; 105) and Dubhe (1m-2m; 103); dam 1m2f-1m4f winner (including Irish Oaks; 118), sister to King George winner Nathaniel; lots to like there but, as stablemate of Sea The Storm, the betting should give all-important clues."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Ceinture d'Orion",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Kingmambo",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "52.9",
        "model_pct": "15.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.43",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "210,000euros yearling by Sea The Stars; 11th foal; closely related to 9.4f-1m2f AW winner Demonstration (RPR 91), half-sister to five winners including Jouska (5f 2yo/6f Listed; 107) and Wasim (6.5f-7f including 2yo/dirt; 102); dam US 1m winner; faces a good rival on debut but respected on paper."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Nowshesdancing (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kaiya Fraser",
        "trainer": "Harry Eustace",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "60",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1",
        "sire": "Teofilo",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "10-9",
        "score": "52.5",
        "model_pct": "15.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.58",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+5.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Teofilo filly who made a winning debut when 18-1 for an eight-runner maiden at Dundalk (10.5f, AW) in January, slowly into stride and meeting some traffic but nevertheless coming from last to first; has since changed hands and left Mark Fahey; the form is nothing special but she finished to cracking effect in grabbing that win and has to be capable of better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Matilda Bea",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Australia",
        "dam_sire": "Lomitas",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "45.5",
        "model_pct": "10.5%",
        "fair_odds": "9.55",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+8.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "25,000euros foal, 8,000euros yearling; tenth foal; Australia half-sister to five winners, notably Nicklaus (6f-1m; RPR 99); dam German 1m-1m4f winner (including 2yo/Listed; 101); she'd have to be red hot on debut to beat an on-song Sea The Storm, though."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Lady Buttercup (GB)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Donald McCain",
        "ts": "5",
        "rpr": "45",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "54-",
        "sire": "Dartmouth",
        "dam_sire": "Tobougg",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "41.1",
        "model_pct": "8.3%",
        "fair_odds": "12.11",
        "best_dec": "201.00",
        "edge": "+5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bumper winner in September 2024 but 0-7 over hurdles, followed by two low-level performances under Flat rules; best watched for now."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Wadacre Geisha (GB)",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "24",
        "rpr": "50",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "98",
        "sire": "Study Of Man",
        "dam_sire": "The Gurkha",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "36.6",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.38",
        "best_dec": "151.00",
        "edge": "+5.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has run twice this spring, improving at Beverley (8.5f, good to soft) 11 days ago but that was still a 15l defeat and low-level form."
      }
    ]
  },

        "edge": "+1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Campaigned mainly over 5f, most recently 2l fourth at Nottingham last weekend; remains well treated, having gained both handicap wins off higher marks, and has two pieces of 6f form this year; shortlisted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "fair_odds": "6.27",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-7.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Best effort for current stable when close second at Thirsk (7f) in most recent turf attempt; still nicely handicapped, having recorded both wins (6f) off higher marks; commands respect back down in distance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Ishe Worth Agamble (GB)",

        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "5385-7",

        "stall": 1,

        "fair_odds": "8.48",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Absent since a defeat 100 days ago that took his AW record to 0-5; three-time turf winner and ran well at Leicester on most recent attempt in this sphere; returns to a favourable scenario."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "King David",

        "trainer": "Gay Kelleway",
        "ts": "59",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record is only 1-22 and he has been campaigned mainly on AW, mostly at 7f; worth another go over 6f and is the opposite of Phoenix Moon, being 10lb lower than last turf appearance; not ruled out."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Completed a 1m hat-trick last June; form has dipped over 7f/6f/5f in last three outings and he has enough to prove in another sprint race; tongue-tie added."

        "spotlight": "Delivered on debut promise when winning Thirsk novice (7f, good to firm) last August and probably bettered that form when second in a quite valuable Ayr race (7f, soft) a few weeks later; makes handicap debut after seven-month absence (gelded in the autumn) but should have more to offer."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Perhaps a shade disappointing when upped to 7f for soft-ground Listed race on final 2yo start but won Hamilton maiden (6f, soft) in September and the form of her close second at Goodwood (6f, good) in August reads well; still has untapped potential over this trip and beyond; interesting."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well down the field in two valuable AW handicaps at start of this year but this month's second at Southwell (7f, AW) was much better, albeit no match for the winner; probably needs another step forward."

      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Left inauspicious debut a long way behind when winning 6f AW maiden in Ireland in November and followed up in Southwell novice (7f, AW) for new stable three weeks ago; has more on his plate in this handicap and needs to prove himself on turf but remains unexposed."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1m maiden winner at Dundalk (AW) for Ger Lyons in November, his fifth start; absent since second in a claimer over that C&D in December and, given his tendency to race too freely, removing the hood on this stable debut looks risky."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made all to justify odds-on favouritism in Redcar novice (1m, good) in October on third start but ran poorly when upped to 1m1f for subsequent Newmarket nursery; gelded soon afterwards and now drops back in trip for this reappearance outing."

        "spotlight": "Just two wins from his 33 starts (both over 1m last spring on good/yielding) but he was highly consistent last year and ran another big race when going close on last month's stable debut at Newcastle (1m, AW); every chance he'll be bang there once more."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six wins last July-October (various ground) and campaign concluded with a near-miss over C&D; continued the good work when runner-up in a recent 0-95 here (1m1f, good) and he has leading claims back down in grade."

      {

        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-7 on turf and hanging right on AW has been costly on her last two starts, being demoted from first at Wolverhampton (8.6f) then finishing third at Newcastle (1m; raced mostly alone); however, this front-runner arrives in good heart and has shown promise on grass; could be in the shake-up."

        "fair_odds": "10.17",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Front-runner who won five times last April-July (good/good to firm), including over C&D; down the field at Nottingham last October when last seen but this mark isn't necessarily beyond her in view of her good third at Haydock (1m, good) in September; could make a bold bid if fully tuned up."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "edge": "-0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two in a row last May/June (8.3f/1m1f, good/soft) and beaten just a head on this month's reappearance at Pontefract (1m, good to soft); this front-runner has a progressive profile and is one to consider today."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "11yo who was as good as ever last season, winning three times, including at Ayr in September when last season; this two-time course winner is not ruled out on his return but there's a suspicion he'll improve for the run."

        "edge": "-5.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent but she returned to form with a close third at Lingfield (7f, AW) this month on her third stable start; she's fine at 1m and on turf and can be in the mix if backing up that latest performance."
      },
      {

        "edge": "+2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "10yo who has an up-and-down profile last year and this is his first run since September; however, he was a good third over C&D (good) on his reappearance last April and won here (1m1f, good) in July; not ruled out each-way."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-10 and has come seventh on his three starts for this yard (7f/6f); however, he hasn't been running badly, with his latest effort coming in a big field at Thirsk, and there have been hints that his return to 1m may suit."

        "spotlight": "Last season's high points were his second at Doncaster (1m, good) in May and a win at Ayr (7f, good) in August; however, he's inconsistent and has to be at the very top of his game to win this on his reappearance."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't need to improve on her 2yo form to win a 6f fillies' novice at Chelmsford in January; returns to 7f with a hood fitted; brings untapped potential to this handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Rosa Inglesa (GB)",

        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-8.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Useful ability over 7f as a 2yo, winning a Chelmsford novice on her second start and finishing a creditable sixth in a big-field sales race at Newmarket when last seen; likely there is more to come and she is an interesting handicap debutante."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved with each of her four starts, winning a 7f novice at Newcastle in December and adding a 1m handicap at Kempton four weeks ago; had more to spare than the winning margin of a neck might indicate on that occasion and a 5lb rise may not prove insurmountable."
      },

        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.52",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2lb lower than when seeing off 15 rivals in a 7f handicap (good ground) at York last summer; neither run this year points to him being the answer today though."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Hale End (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Michael Dods",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "531-44",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Morpheus",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "50.5",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.36",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He was winning for the fifth time when landing a 1m handicap at Southwell in December; not far short of that level in defeat on his next two starts; each-way shout if getting a good pace to aim at."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Rajapour",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "-95578",
        "sire": "Almanzor",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.44",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Now 2lb lower than for December's Wolverhampton success (8.6f; visored first time) but that is a result of some poor runs since; change of headgear not enough to tempt."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Zarathos",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Dylan Cunha",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "4372-0",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "48.9",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.39",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "16-race maiden but regularly placed; down the field at Doncaster on his reappearance four weeks ago but drops in class today and should be sharper."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Lever Up (GB)",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "32844-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "48.4",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.65",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ten-race maiden; bits of form last summer that bring him into the reckoning and he kicks off his 4yo campaign with a tongue tie fitted; betting useful back from 236 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Mount King",
        "jockey": "Sean Kirrane",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "6673-7",
        "sire": "National Defense",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "47.5",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.71",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His last three wins have come over 1m at Pontefract but he finished down the field at that track on his recent return to action; that run could have sharpened him up and he is on a winning mark; not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Dark Rosa",
        "jockey": "Harry Vigors(7)",
        "trainer": "Georgina Nicholls",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "517-57",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Diamond Green",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "47.2",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.46",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Shot back up the weights after an easy win at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW) in November; latest Bath run was after a 12-week absence and she may fare better today with her rider's 7lb claim useful."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "West Tyrone",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Lizzie Quinlan",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "7602-8",

        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "41.4",
        "model_pct": "2.3%",
        "fair_odds": "43.70",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "-0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't progress as may have been expected following a 1m win at Southwell last March; dropped away to finish eighth of the nine runners on last month's stable debut at Newcastle (1m); enough to prove for now."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Musselburgh",
    "time": "16:45",
    "race_name": "Sky Bet Club Fillies' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m1f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Epidavros (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Katie Scott",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "5635-4",
        "sire": "Magna Grecia",
        "dam_sire": "Dream Ahead",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "54.1",
        "model_pct": "16.7%",
        "fair_odds": "5.98",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-12 last year but often ran well, including over C&D, and she reappeared with a solid fourth here (1m, good) a fortnight ago; has a chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Lady Dora Mae",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(3)",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "41",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "7-2118",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "12.0%",
        "fair_odds": "8.36",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Southwell novice (1m, AW) in January and followed up on handicap debut at Kempton (7f, AW); eighth of 12 at Lingfield (7f, AW) since but beaten only about 2l and this lightly raced 3yo may still have more to offer, with her pedigree hinting that this step up in trip may well be a plus."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Donna Nook (GB)",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "3-8343",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Arch",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.49",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Continues to drop down the weights and ran okay when third in January last time; another 3lb lower today but she's been beaten on her 15 starts since winning in December 2024 on her second run; hard to be overly confident."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Glorious Kitty (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",
        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "6229-2",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Naaqoos",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "11.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.96",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-13 but unexposed at this sort of trip; twice finished runner-up last October (1m/8.3f, AW/good) and reappeared with close second at Beverley (8.4f, good to soft) recently; she can be thereabouts once more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sovereign Bright",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "735-33",
        "sire": "Ten Sovereigns",
        "dam_sire": "Montjeu",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.21",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Convincingly beaten when third on both outings this year (1m/1m2f, AW) and she's 0-8; however, she's run just twice on turf and the first occasion produced her career-best RPR, when going close at Doncaster (7f, good to firm) last June; the other run on grass was on heavy going last July; the return to turf could be a major positive for this 3yo."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Naturalia",
        "jockey": "Shay Farmer(7)",
        "trainer": "Donald Whillans",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "4990-2",
        "sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Forestry",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "47.7",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.81",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Ayr (1m5f, good) last July and this month's reappearance second at Catterick was over 1m4f; drops back to 1m1f here but she's shown versatility in terms of trip in the past and could again be involved at the finish."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Polygram (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Tristan Davidson",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "73",

        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.69",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 0-9 when 6l seventh of ten on stable debut here (7f, good) a fortnight ago; however, she may have needed that run and she ran well at up to 1m2f when with Harry Charlton; interesting now back up in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Bearin Up",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "75",

        "dam_sire": "Declaration Of War",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-9",

        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.94",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mixed form in nurseries last autumn and only seventh of 12 on this month's reappearance at Nottingham; however, she won a nursery at Ripon (1m, good) last September and could improve for her recent run; not written off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "trainer": "Charlie Clover",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "77",

        "dam_sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "stall": 12,

        "fair_odds": "20.01",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 4-7 since joining Charlie Clover when winning at Lingfield (1m, AW) last month; has also won over 1m2f on turf; disappointing favourite at Pontefract since but was restless in the stalls; may be worth another chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "ts": "64",

        "fair_odds": "22.00",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well treated on this year's AW form; however, she has an up-and-down profile and has a lower turf mark for good reason on previous evidence."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won on nursery debut at Lingfield (1m, AW) in January on final start for Marco Botti; however, she needs to produce more than she's managed this spring on her first two outings for this yard; turf debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins on AW towards end of last year (1m2f/1m4f, AW) and she's had a break since a lesser run in January; drops back in trip and needs to prove she's effective on turf, but she hasn't had much racing and is not ruled out."
      },

      }
    ]

  {
    "course": "Nottingham",

    "type": "flat",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",

        "rpr": "128",

        "fair_odds": "2.24",
        "best_dec": "1.40",
        "edge": "-35.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Smart filly who is a Group 3 and Group 2 winner at York (1m1f/1m2f); has plenty of Group 1 form, including placed efforts at Royal Ascot (against males) and Longchamp (close second) last season; takes on some unexposed and interesting rivals but sets a high standard for them to aim at; respected back down sharply in class."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "That's Amore (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "1/4-1",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.0",
        "model_pct": "18.0%",
        "fair_odds": "5.56",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+10.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Similar type to Love Dynasty, being very lightly raced and one who may still be capable of bigger figures; fourth in the 2025 Cheshire Oaks is flanked by novice wins, latest at Southwell (1m3f, AW) on seasonal debut; likely has a better chance than bare ratings suggest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Love Dynasty (FR)",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "Kevin Ryan",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "/1/43-",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "13.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.68",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Very lightly raced 5yo who has been kept to autumn races on soft/heavy ground; something to prove in this new scenario but otherwise an interesting type, having gained her 3yo success at Nottingham (1m) and being still open to further improvement; ran well in Listed contests the last twice and gives the impression she's ready for a crack at this new trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Lava Stream",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "11296/",

        "dam_sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",

        "fair_odds": "10.73",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Absent since a 2024 campaign that ended with her coming up short in the Irish Oaks and Yorkshire Oaks; progressive earlier and went close in the Ribblesdale at Royal Ascot (1m4f) when bidding for a four-timer; could go well, provided she returns in good order."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Alla Stella",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Sir Mark Prescott Bt",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "107",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Best 2yo form when making the frame in Sandown Listed event and Curragh Group 3; one of two contestants who have been absent since 2024; needs improvement on ratings; market should offer further guidance."
      },

        "stall": 2,

        "fair_odds": "15.39",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Irish filly who has very low mileage; completed a Curragh double (maiden/handicap) last summer; reappearance effort in Cork Listed event (kept to 1m4f) suggests this drop back in trip is worth exploring; may rate higher still; interesting."
      }
    ]
  },

        "ts": "44",

        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "48.4",

        "fair_odds": "11.23",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two solid efforts for Roger Varian last summer, winning a 6f maiden at Lingfield (AW) on debut before finishing third under a penalty at Doncaster (6f, good to firm); not so good on his stable debut at Lingfield last month (after nine months off) but he looks to be on a fair mark for his handicap debut."
      },

        "fair_odds": "12.37",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two 5f handicaps at Beverley in the space of a week last July; went close off 1lb lower at Pontefract in October; ran well on last year's seasonal debut but just a suspicion others are better handicapped."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",

  {
    "course": "Musselburgh",
    "time": "17:15",
    "race_name": "Sky Bet For The Fans Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m4f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Hamlet's Night",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "7764-1",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "60.3",
        "model_pct": "28.7%",
        "fair_odds": "3.49",
        "best_dec": "2.50",
        "edge": "-12.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won on Kempton AW (1m3f; not proven over this far) in February and latest start was up with his best hurdles form; 0-13 on Flat turf but that includes five seconds."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Fast Fred (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Phillip Makin",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "6D66-21",
        "sire": "Outstrip",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "18.4%",
        "fair_odds": "5.43",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second at Newcastle (1m4f, AW) on reappearance and better than ever when taking a 14-runner handicap over C&D (good) two weeks ago; 4lb higher this time but firmly in the mix."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Night Breeze",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "095403",
        "sire": "New Approach",
        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "53.1",
        "model_pct": "13.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.39",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won off just 1lb lower at Ascot (1m4f, good to firm) last August, his second win there last year; 0-12 on AW but close third on latest start (first with tongue tied) was up with his best form; should go well."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Rising Sky",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Anthony McCann",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "647-71",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "48.7",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.76",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made her 15th start, with tongue-tie and blinkers replacing cheekpieces, when getting off the mark in a nine-runner handicap at Dundalk (10.5f, AW) one month ago, doing it in clearcut style under 7lb claimer; has comparable form on good ground but not proven over this far (tried it on penultimate start) and she's 4lb out of the handicap."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Eroico (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Martin Todhunter",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "/5442-",
        "sire": "Phoenix Of Spain",
        "dam_sire": "Camelot",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "47.7",
        "model_pct": "7.7%",
        "fair_odds": "12.97",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-5 in Irish maidens, taking minor honours on last three outings (1m2f/1m4f on softer than good); has since changed hands and left Noel Meade; improvement is probably needed on this British, seasonal and handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Letsbefrank (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Lauren Young(5)",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "04575-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Polar Falcon",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "47.1",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.90",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins (1m3f, 1m6f and 2m1f) in summer 2024 and he's 7lb below his last winning mark; struggled to get competitive last year until his running-on fifth under Lauren Young in a blanket finish on final start (1m4f, soft); reappearance record isn't great and today's test may be a bit too sharp for him."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Princess Niyla",
        "jockey": "Faye McManoman",
        "trainer": "Alan Brown",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "425-93",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Oratorio",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "46.0",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.57",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close third at Beverley (8.5f) 11 days ago and she's won twice there at 1m2f, but her record at 1m3f-1m4f (six races) is less convincing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Furhaan (GB)",
        "jockey": "Amie Waugh(3)",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "9415-0",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "43.9",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.42",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won handicap debut at Windsor (11.5f, heavy) in September and creditable fifth at Yarmouth (11.5f, good) the following month; left Ed Walker for 32,000gns in October and last week's reappearance (25-1) did not suggest an imminent return to winning form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Motawaared (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rhys Elliott(5)",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "23767-",
        "sire": "Mohaather",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "42.4",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.68",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Down the field for George Boughey last May/June in his first two handicaps (1m4f/1m2f) and sold for 12,000gns in July; beaten further still at Ayr (1m) in September on his only start for new yard; moves back up in trip and needs to tap back into his initial promise."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Nottingham",
    "time": "17:25",
    "race_name": "Pertemps Network Industrial Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m6f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Macari (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rose Dawes(5)",
        "trainer": "Sheena West",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "3317-4",

        "dam_sire": "Captain Marvelous",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "58.9",
        "model_pct": "28.9%",
        "fair_odds": "3.45",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+17.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "An excellent Flat campaign last year yielded three turf wins under Rose Dawes from May to October and he's been in AW/hurdles action this winter; absent 11 weeks but has to be considered seriously."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Codiak",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "521-13",
        "sire": "Make Believe",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "57.3",
        "model_pct": "21.3%",
        "fair_odds": "4.70",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Raised his game for two 1m4f wins this winter and ran respectably in another AW race three weeks ago after 81 days off; a close call on turf on handicap debut (1m6f, good) last November gives plenty of encouragement that he will prove as effective moving away from AW this afternoon; in the mix."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Just An Hour",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Rod Millman",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "4424-4",
        "sire": "Justify",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "18.7%",
        "fair_odds": "5.36",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-8.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had 1m2f wins last April (here), June and July; kept his form well, including when second in October on his only attempt at 1m6f; recent reappearance was another creditable show here and he has each-way claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Rock N Roll Pinkie",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "1326-2",
        "sire": "Sun Central",
        "dam_sire": "Beat All",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "54.3",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.28",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-10.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3-10 at Nottingham, including the first of last year's three wins; effective at 1m6f/2m and ran well on recent return, so shortlisted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Spirit Of Jura",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "206-47",
        "sire": "Masar",
        "dam_sire": "Duke Of Marmalade",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "53.9",
        "model_pct": "11.0%",
        "fair_odds": "9.06",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four wins over 1m-1m5f last January-August, the first three on the AW and the last on good ground; reappearance in March wasn't too bad but she was last of seven 18 days ago, which she needs to leave way behind her."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Imperial Sovereign",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Philip Kirby",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "6423-4",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "52.2",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.52",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-10.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole win (17 races) was a novice event in 2023; ended 2025 when bang there in two AW handicaps (2m/1m6f) and he wasn't disgraced behind Rock N Roll Pinkie on recent return, but not the percentage call."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Front-runner who won twice in the second half of last year, the latest in a big field at Thirsk (7f, good) in September; went close on last month's reappearance at Newcastle (7f, AW) and he can make another bold bid."

        "spotlight": "Won at Newcastle (7f, AW) in January and close fourth at Wolverhampton (7f, AW) in February before winning over this C&D (good) a fortnight ago; it was a tight finish but he's gone up just 2lb; again in calculations."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Running consistently well over 6f/7f on AW this winter and when a close fifth of seven at Lingfield (6f, AW) two months ago it was a tough Class 2; five runs on turf have yielded two wins and this Irish challenger is on the shortlist back down in grade and back on grass."
      },

        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well beaten on reappearance at Newcastle (6f, AW) 30 days ago and needs to be an entirely different proposition today; however, he's on a competitive mark on last season's best efforts and his C&D form figures read 123, with all three of those runs coming in cheekpieces (which go back on)."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ex-French 4yo who built upon his previous promise to win a maiden at Compiegne (1m, heavy) last September when last seen; sold for 35,000gns the following month; one of three for Jim Goldie; a market check is advised."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "She's well handicapped on 2024 2yo form; last year wasn't devoid of spark but it was an underwhelming campaign and she has to raise her game."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Her mark continues to slide and she ran fairly well at Thirsk (7f, good) last week on her second start for Jim Goldie, who should get a win out of her at some point; however, she needs another step in the right direction today."

        "spotlight": "Campaigned mostly on AW for Richard Hughes, for whom he won at Southwell last March, but he ran well when third of 16 at Doncaster (7f, good to soft) four weeks ago on his stable/seasonal debut; he's one to consider."

      }
    ]

        "spotlight": "Ridden by Rossa Ryan (now on Kurios Lady) on last two starts, prevailing narrowly at Kempton (1m3f) before a close fourth at Southwell (1m3f); they were on AW and he ran only once on turf last year, when a respectable third off this mark at Haydock (1m2f, good) last July but he needs better than that."
      },
      {

        "fair_odds": "3.61",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-13.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Best effort in six outings for Hughie Morrison was her win in a handicap at Ffos Las (1m2f, good to soft) in August, the first of two starts in cheekpieces; first-time hood when pipped in 15-runner race at Doncaster (1m2f, good to soft) four weeks ago, which was a bright start under Ashley Lewis for new yard; up 3lb but a player if she's as effective on today's ground."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Kurios Lady (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "James Tate",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "81",

        "fair_odds": "4.41",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four AW races, with fair form in her three this season; latest start was her closest finish when running on from towards rear to be sixth of 12 on handicap debut at Kempton (1m3f) early last month, beaten just over 2l; has the same mark today and something to build on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Musselburgh (1m1f) last April and went close here (1m, again on good) next time, but that form has not been repeated; well down the weights, so the second of his three runs this season offered some hope."
      },

        "rank": 5,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Registered a 1m2f double on good to firm last July, with the first leg at this track; off the boil in the autumn (with cheekpieces added on final start) but one result is that she's now just 1lb above her last winning mark."
      }
    ]

      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runaway winner of four-runner novice at Catterick (upped to 1m4f, good to firm) last August; had wind surgery in November and a clearcut win when favourite for seven-runner handicap at Newcastle (1m4f, AW) five weeks ago; should stay and 6lb rise doesn't look harsh; well related and could easily have more to offer, so the hat-trick beckons."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "fair_odds": "5.16",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won small-field races at Hamilton for a maiden (1m3f, good to firm) last May and handicap (1m5f, good) last July; seriously raised in class when tailed-off last at 14-1 in the Melrose Handicap at York (1m6f, good to firm; again sweating) last August, but he could be of renewed interest on this reappearance for an in-form yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "96",

        "model_pct": "17.6%",
        "fair_odds": "5.69",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Scored twice (1m6f/2m) for Darryll Holland last August and made an encouraging start for his new yard when third to St Faz on Lingfield AW five weeks ago; the first of those wins was impressive over 1m6f on good to firm and he's one to consider despite today's 15lb higher mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "trainer": "Dianne Sayer",

        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "51.5",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.40",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Plentiful form at Musselburgh with three C&D wins, including last August for his only Flat win last year (4lb higher today); never dangerous when 50-1 for reappearance here two weeks ago but showed promise from out the back and could be a lot more potent this time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Trojan Sun",
        "jockey": "Lauren Young(5)",
        "trainer": "Jim Goldie",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "92",

        "fair_odds": "13.84",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "4-11 at Musselburgh, including three 1m6f/2m wins on good ground last May-October; also scored at Nottingham in October, a runaway win over 2m2f on heavy going which sees him 3lb higher today; soundly beaten at 40-1 here on reappearance three weeks ago and, judged on last season, it may take him another run before he refinds his form."
      },
      {

        "rpr": "-",

        "fair_odds": "14.30",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "4-15 for David Simcock, including two wins in summer 2024, before tailed off that September on his only appearance for this yard; dropped just 3lb in his absence and probably best watched this time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Whimsy",

        "stall": 3,

        "fair_odds": "14.50",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had three seasons with Andrew Balding, including three wins, and has been with this yard since July 2023, including for two wins (one over hurdles) and plenty of place returns; third over 1m4f in her only two Flat runs in the last 13 months, including under Patrick McGettigan 17 days ago, and her very solid Flat record for this trainer suggests she will be on the premises."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seen mostly over jumps in his Irish days; 3-3 on AW (1m6f/2m) last month upon joining this stable, before a lesser show three weeks ago when getting hampered at the start prevented his usual tactics; not ruled out on return to turf."
      }

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent last year but won twice (5f, good), including over C&D, and he returned to form with a near-miss at Newcastle (5f, AW) last month; major player if he's once more on a going day."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "fair_odds": "8.16",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-12.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced 4yo who built on his reappearance second over C&D (soft) to win a 17-runner handicap over C&D (good to soft) a fortnight ago; also effective on good/good to firm; up 7lb for last time but did it nicely and he could be just the type of Jim Goldie sprinter to keep on improving."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Jer Batt",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "David & Nicola Barron",

        "fair_odds": "9.50",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-5.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Without a win since August 2024 but well treated on last year's best efforts and he shaped when seventh of 14 over C&D three weeks ago as though he'd be sharper for that comeback run; seems to like it here; on the shortlist."
